summary.summary: Reworked alerting changes merged to dev: removes stale .carbsRequired test arguments (moved to GlucoseAlertType) by updating TrioTests, fixes snooze-alert long-press handling in HomeRootView (replaces a direct state.showModal(for: .snooze) in at least one location with toggling showSnoozeSheet and adjusts gesture handling), minor code/formatting tweaks in CustomCGMOptionsView, localization comment edits in Localizable.xcstrings, and multiple OmnipodKit submodule bumps. The PR merge commit is included.
summary.userFacingImpact: Likely changes how the snooze long-press opens the snooze UI (code shows a change from state.showModal(for: .snooze) to setting showSnoozeSheet = true) and updates alert-related tests (removal of .carbsRequired test entries). Other edits are localization/comment updates and submodule updates. The provided changes do not conclusively document all runtime impacts; human review is recommended to verify behavior and alerting semantics at runtime.
